mapper.select: select f1.IOBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECT f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where UPPER(f2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{inputDataId}) and f2.sys_id = #{inputSourceCode} and f1.IOBJ_SOURCE = #{inputSourceFirm, jdbcType = INTEGER}

select obj_chiname as inputObjChiName, t.tablename as tableRealName, sys_id as inputSysId, sys_source as inputIobjSource, obj_engname as inputObjEngName, iobj_guid as objGuid from (select obj_chiname, sys_id, sys_source, obj_engname, iobj_guid from standardize_inputobject f2 inner join standardize_object f3 on f3.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) so right join (select sourceid, tablename from (select sourceid, tablename from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' order by sourceid desc) x where upper(tablename) = upper(#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and rownum = 1 and sourceid is not null) t on upper(t.sourceid) = upper(so.obj_engname)
